'''Jack Teanby''' (born 14 May 1996) is a [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland international]] [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a [[Rugby league positions#Prop|prop]] for [[Keighley Cougars]] in [[RFL League 1]].

==Background==
Teanby was born in [[Leeds]], [[West Yorkshire, England]].

==Career==

=== Dewsbury Rams ===
Teanby signed for the Rams in 2016 playing 77 games in his three year tenure at the club.<ref name="Powerful prop Teanby has first team in sights">{{cite web |date=5 October 2015 |title=Powerful prop Teanby has first team in sights |url=http://www.dewsburyrams.co.uk/news/article/47220/powerful-prop-teanby-has-first |accessdate=23 September 2016 |publisher=Dewsbury Rams }}{{Dead link|date=July 2025 |bot=InternetArchiveBot |fix-attempted=yes }}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=Teanby leaves for York – Dewsbury Rams RLFC |url=https://dewsburyrams.co.uk/2018/10/21/teanby-leaves-for-york/ |access-date=2025-06-10 |website=dewsburyrams.co.uk}}</ref>

===York Knights===
In October 2018 he signed a one-year deal to join the [[York Knights]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/16997956.york-city-knights-sign-highly-rated-championship-prop-jack-teanby/|title=York City Knights sign highly-rated Championship prop Jack Teanby|work=York Press|date=21 October 2018|accessdate=25 October 2018}}</ref> He quickly established himself as a fan favourite, he help York reach the 1895 Cup final in 2021, starting in the close loss to [[Featherstone Rovers]].<ref>{{Cite web |date=2021-07-17 |title=1895 Cup Final: Featherstone Rovers beat York City Knights 41-34 to win at Wembley |url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/57873755 |access-date=2025-06-10 |website=BBC Sport |language=en-gb}}</ref> In 2025 York  Knights went on to beat Featherstone Rovers in narrow 4-5 final at Wembley. Jack did not feature in the final with him struggling to find game time in the 2025 season with York.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2025-06-10 |title=Knights legend Jack Teanby leaves the club after seven seasons |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/25229357.york-knights-announce-jack-teanbys-departure-seven-seasons/ |access-date=2025-06-10 |website=York Press |language=en}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/teanby-signs-new-deal-with-york-rlfc |access-date=2025-06-10 |website=www.yorkrlfc.com|title=Teanby signs new deal with York RLFC|date=20 November 2024 }}</ref>

===Keighley Cougars (loan)===
On 21 May 2025 he joined [[Keighley Cougars]] on a 2-week loan.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Teanby joins Cougars on loan – Keighley Cougars |url=https://keighleycougars.uk/teanby-joins-cougars-on-loan |access-date=2025-05-22 |language=en-US|website=Keighley Cougars RLFC}}</ref> His debut came in a 6-30 loss against league leaders, the [[North Wales Crusaders]]. However the following week he helped Keighley get their first league win of the season with a 52-0 win over [[Newcastle Thunder]] at [[Blaydon RFC|Blaydon RUFC]], Teanby scored a brace of tries in the match.<ref name=JTsignCougars>{{Cite web |title=Jack Teanby signs with Cougars – Keighley Cougars |url=https://keighleycougars.uk/jack-teanby-signs-with-cougars |access-date=2025-06-10 |language=en-US}}</ref>

===Keighley Cougars===
On 10 June 2025 [[Keighley Cougars]] confirmed that Teanby had signed permanently for the [[RFL League 1]] club on a 2½-year deal.<ref name=JTsignCougars/><ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=11 Jun 2025|author=Stephen Ibbetson|title=Keighley Cougars sign prop from York Knights on long-term deal|url=https://www.totalrl.com/keighley-cougars-sign-prop-from-york-knights-on-long-term-deal/}}</ref>
